item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly wakes up to the repeated local-repair pattern and rejects opening another transfer channel. Turn 2 keeps the brake active under pressure and does not deliver the requested channel patch, but its emergency alternative is incomplete: it handles today's complaint through an upstream decision point and says to start governance, yet it does not visibly state a one-time exception, no baseline lift in operational terms, and a structural repair deadline. The missing bounded-emergency contract prevents full pass."}
